notFound.title: This essence has faded away
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Let us guide you back to our essences.

hero.intro: Discover the magic of our exclusive perfumes. Let yourself be carried away by a unique sensory experience, where every essence tells a story.

elegancia.title: Elegance
elegancia.body: It sets the exact timing, measures the finest attitude and creates a pause that intrigues in everything it yields. To be part of a story you created to go far and make your presence felt with just a scent. Bernuy is made of the limits you cannot imagine — a beyond, a portrait and a way to reclaim your unmatched touch that reveals the finest human sensation.

personalidad.title: Personality
personalidad.body: Make the difference and excellence in everything. Bernuy holds the secret, but the decision is yours. Do you accept the challenge? What you show when you step out for your daily life is at stake: you must be the one who draws high attention, simply through something unseen at first glance, yet fully enjoyed.

sensualidad.title: Sensuality
sensualidad.body: You, the woman who wishes to present herself in the best possible way wherever she goes — never let what can drive you to be the most beautiful among those around you be missing: you are beautiful the moment you wear Bernuy. You are different from the rest, a connoisseur of quality and of the difference between the genuine and the pleasurable. Turn your days into unforgettable jewels of moments in which you were yourself, natural, and triumphed simply by wearing the finest fragrance with intelligence.

origin.headline: Six bottles, six letters. Together, our fragrances spell BERNUY.
origin.alt: The six BERNUY fragrances forming the word BERNUY

detail.scrollCue: Scroll and discover more about this fragrance

home.title: Welcome
home.description: BERNUY — luxury perfume house. Discover six exclusive fragrances where every essence tells a story.

b.name: Audaz
b.tagline: A fragrance for a man of taste.
b.description: A fragrance for a man of taste. A masculine composition that opens with fresh notes of bergamot and lime, balanced by a sophisticated Lavender note with a floral accord of Violet and Rose. Its deep, woody character comes from the base, made of the dry delicacy of Vetiver with a warm, enveloping trail of Patchouli and Leather.
b.quote: A fragrance for a man of taste.

e.name: Eterno
e.tagline: A pure fragrance that shines with style.
e.description: Fruity facets through a juicy RASPBERRY. An abundance of fresh SAFFRON, luminous petals with a clean, addictive floral at its heart, creates an elegant and natural atmosphere. Sophistication arises in the base thanks to a contemporary blend of vanilla and musks, delivering an exceptional second-skin feel.
e.quote: A pure, radiant fragrance that shines with style.

r.name: Radiante
r.description: The fragrance offers an intense masculine aura. At the top, the vivid freshness of bergamot and lime blends with spicy pepper. At the heart, an aromatic mix of lavender, clove and rose creates an elegant masculinity. Finally, the fragrance reveals a sensual trail of amber, musk and warm balsamic.
r.quote: The fragrance offers an intense masculine aura.

n.name: Nocturno
n.tagline: A seductive bouquet of berries and rose.
n.description: The fragrance opens with a velvety accord of spiced berries and citrus. Notes leading to a heart of pink rose and violet. The base characteristics: a warm amber extract, the darker tones of patchouli and a sweet vanilla.
n.quote: A seductive bouquet of spiced berries and pink rose, with a warm base of amber, patchouli and sweet vanilla.

u.name: Único
u.description: A sophisticated, enveloping fragrance that unfolds its character with vibrant notes of citrus and spice. A refined floral heart intertwines with noble woods, while the warm base of amber and musk leaves an unmistakable trail of distinction and good taste.
u.quote: Distinction in every note: vibrant citrus, a refined floral heart and a warm amber trail.

y.name: Sublime
y.description: A captivating green and fresh feminine fragrance that transports you to lush nature. A new bouquet imbued with a captivating citrus presence and herbal notes, creating an innovative, avant-garde sensation that immerses you in the perfect blend of character and original rebellion.
y.quote: A fresh, green feminine fragrance that fuses lush nature with an avant-garde touch of character and rebellion.
